title: fingardia lokonensis
intro: Fingardia lokonensis is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Lokon flower or Lokon daisy. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Fingardia lokonensis include its potential to treat fever, sore throat, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Fingardia lokonensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its dried leaves and flowers can be used in traditional remedies and folk medicine.
